name: Impatriate regime at median income in Lazio
description: Expat with impatriate regime earning €60,000 in Lazio (Rome), standard 50% exemption. INPS contributions are deducted from gross first, then impatriate percentage applied to reduced amount.

sources.description: Impatriate regime 2026: 50% of income exempt. INPS deducted from gross before exemption calculation.
Benefits from 2026 reduced IRPEF second bracket (33% vs 35%).
